name: Chocolate Angel Food Cake
recipeIngredient: 11 large egg whites, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Lightly grease a 10-inch tube pan with a removable bottom and dust with cocoa powder. Resift the cake flour five times with the cocoa powder and 1/3 cup granulated sugar.
Whip egg whites: Using 1/4 of the egg whites at a time, beat all the whites until foamy. Add the cream of tartar when all 11 egg whites are foamy. Continue to whip the egg whites, adding 1/4 cup sugar (about 3 tablespoons) at a time. Stir in the vanilla extract and optional chocolate extract.
Combine ingredients: Sift 1/4 of the flour mixture into the batter and gently fold until finished with the flour.
Pour batter: Gently pour the batter into the prepared pan. Use a knife to move through the batter, removing air pockets.
Bake: Bake in the preheated oven for 45 minutes.
Cool: Invert the pan and let cool for 1½ hours. Remove from the pan and drizzle with vanilla glaze.
Vanilla Glaze:
1/2 cup powdered sugar
1/4 teaspoon vanilla extract
Up to 3 teaspoons water
